title: Reading Comprehension Questions
tagline: Cite Evidence | Make Inferences | Support Claims
objectives:
• Cite textual evidence to support analysis of what the text says explicitly
• Draw inferences from text using evidence to support conclusions
directions: Read each question carefully. Choose the best answer for questions 1-5. Write your response for questions 6-10.

questions.question: Which sentence best supports the claim that recycling helps the environment?
What can you infer about the character based on this evidence: 'Sarah packed extra snacks'?
Which detail explicitly states the main problem in the article?
What evidence supports the inference that the experiment was successful?
Which quote directly supports the author's main argument?

options.A: Many experts agree on this topic

questions.question: Find two pieces of evidence that support the claim that exercise improves academic performance.
questions.answer: Students who exercise score 15% higher on tests. Physical activity increases brain function and memory retention according to the research.

questions.question: What can you infer about the setting based on the textual clues provided? Use evidence to support your answer.
questions.answer: The setting is a small rural town. Evidence includes 'dirt roads,' 'one traffic light,' and 'everyone knows each other.'

questions.question: Cite evidence that shows the character's motivation changed throughout the story.
questions.answer: Initially, Tom 'wanted fame and fortune.' Later, he 'realized helping others mattered more than money' after volunteering.

questions.question: Analyze how the author uses evidence to support their argument about climate change. Cite specific examples from the text.
questions.answer: The author uses statistical evidence like '40% increase in storms' and expert testimony from 'Dr. Smith's research team.' These facts support the claim that climate change causes severe weather patterns.

questions.question: Make an inference about the story's theme using textual evidence. Explain how specific details support your interpretation.
questions.answer: The theme is perseverance overcomes obstacles. Maya 'failed three times but kept trying' and 'finally succeeded through hard work.' Her determination despite setbacks demonstrates this central message.
